name: Personal Information Protection Act
description: South Korea's Personal Information Protection Act — comprehensive data protection law, last significantly amended 2023.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.

license.notes: Government publication. Verify per-jurisdiction reuse terms.

links.source_research_note: Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA), South Korea — Personal Information Protection Commission (PIPC).
links.acquisition_blocker: Korean government sites (pipc.go.kr, law.go.kr) return net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED even via playwright headless browser — likely geo-blocked from North-America-region IPs. English mirror at https://www.privacy.go.kr/eng/ requires JavaScript and country-specific routing; alternative: Korea Law Translation Center (statutes.gov.kr) or an archived snapshot.
